data.entity_name: "THE GHOST OF CHRISTMAS YET TO COME"
"THE GHOSTS OF CHRISTMAS PAST, PRESENT, AND YET TO COME"
"HOLLY, MISTLETOE, RED BERRIES, IVY, TURKEYS, GEESE, GAME, POULTRY, BRAWN, MEAT, PIGS, SAUSAGES, OYSTERS, PIES, PUDDINGS, FRUIT, PUNCH"
"THE CHILD WHO FETCHED SCROOGE FROM THE BOARDING-SCHOOL"
